dependencies.description:
The typing_extensions module contains both backports of these changes as
well as experimental types that will eventually be added to the typing
module, such as Protocol (see PEP 544 for details about protocols and
static duck typing).
dependencies.name: py-typing-extensions

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
napari is a fast, interactive, multi-dimensional image viewer for
Python. It's designed for browsing, annotating, and analyzing large
multi-dimensional images. It's built on top of Qt (for the GUI), vispy
(for performant GPU-based rendering), and the scientific Python stack
(numpy, scipy).
dependent_to.name: py-napari

description:
magicgui is a python library for building graphical user interfaces
(GUIs). It aims to speed up data workflows by providing a simple,
consistent API for creating GUIs to control various data types, that
work across various environments.
name: py-magicgui

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
